text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One particular day off, I'm passing by<n>the
academy entrance when...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-why are there so many<n>couples today?
A-and they're<n>kissing? IN PUBLIC?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
D-dammit! That motorcycle photo<n>book is gonna
sell out if I don't get a<n>move on!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you! Y'know of any ways to<n>avoid the love
fest happenin' on the<n>main road?!
choice_data_list: Run as fast as you can.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The side roads! I totally forgot I could<n>use them
instead!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
They're all twisty 'n' turny, but it's<n>my only
way! I'll just have to put the<n>pedal to the metal!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll catch ya later! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...Just so you know, I'm not afraid of<n>k-ki—things
like that! So don't get the<n>wrong idea!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Run as fast as I can?! Oh, I get it! If I<n>zoom past,
then I won't have to see<n>'em making out!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'mma do just that! I've just<n>gotta run
faster than the speed of<n>light!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Aw, yeah! Nothin's gonna scare me<n>now!
Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...N-not that it was that big of a deal<n>anyway! I
just hate that wishy-washy<n>romance garbage!
Don't get the<n>wrong idea!
